analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet accuses the US of hypocrisy and unfairly repressing Huawei solely because it is Chinese, calling the US action "dirty." Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported, as the tweet portrays the US as hypocritical, hostile to a Chinese company, and acting immorally/"dirty," positioning China/Huawei as a victim. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Not supported; no portrayal of China as cooperative or promoting global benefits. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not relevant. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not supported; no mention of China’s political system or values domestically. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not supported; no claim about CCP governance or China’s achievements. CH6 (China is an interesting country in terms of culture, nature and heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH1 applies.
